models.label: MLX Whisper large-v3-turbo
models.notes: Baseline candidate for Apple Silicon. Good first target because the runtime and tooling are mature.

models.label: Gemma 4 12B Audio
models.notes: Interesting native-audio path. The originally named google/gemma-4-12b-audio id does not exist; the public audio-capable Gemma 4 12B IT checkpoint is used for this branch. Requires chunking because audio clips are capped at 30 seconds.

models.label: Voxtral Mini 3B
models.notes: Long-form audio candidate. Worth testing after the baseline works.

models.label: Parakeet TDT 0.6B v3
models.notes: Potentially fast with strong timestamps, but the Mac setup may be less pleasant.

models.label: MLX Whisper tiny
models.notes: Smoke-test backend only. Fast enough for harness checks, not enough for quality decisions.
